title: Tristanium
text:
Welcome to Tristanium—a digital logbook dedicated to low-budget, open-source science projects based out of the San Juan Islands.
I use this space to document experimental builds, sensory data, and field observations using accessible hardware and creative signal processing.

title: Tristanium
section: Explore the project pages in the menu above to see code, schematics, and field notes.
